name: Street Scene Limousine
registry_source: BBB / Yelp listings (CA SOS bizfile not directly verified)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER keyword search 'STREET SCENE' returned no records. The only similarly named carrier is STREET SCENE LIMOUSINE AND TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 2204317) but that is based in Waterloo, IA — not a match. BBB lists Street Scene Limo as a CA corporation at 1465 Calle Tulipan, Thousand Oaks, CA 91360 with BBB file opened 1/9/2006; rated Not Rated, business 'under review'. Address 1465 Calle Tulipan is a residential property (per Redfin/RE/MAX), consistent with a very small home-based limo/livery operator. Multiple Yelp reviews characterize the company as effectively defunct/unresponsive. Likely intrastate TCP-registered livery operator under CA PUC, not a school-bus operator.

name: Handicap Transportation Inc
registry_source: Yellow Pages / goservices.com / findhelp (OR SOS Business Registry not directly verified via WebFetch)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER keyword search 'HANDICAP TRANSPORTATION' returned no records. Closest matches in SAFER are HANDICAP TRANSPORT SERVICES INC (USDOT 2297773) and AGING AND HANDICAP TRANSPORTATION INC (USDOT 2834394), neither in Salem, OR. Business directory listings confirm Handicap Transportation Inc operates as a medical transport company in Salem at 3850 Croisan Creek Rd S, Salem, OR 97302, phone (503) 391-1401. The address has been a long-standing wheelchair/medical equipment & supplies location for 60+ years. Likely intrastate paratransit/NEMT operator (not FMCSA-regulated). Confirm OR SOS registration directly via secure.sos.state.or.us/cbrmanager (not accessible via WebFetch in this session).

name: Rod-N-Staff Wheelchair
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER keyword search 'ROD-N-STAFF' returned no records. Two similarly named carriers exist but are NOT in Texas: ROD AND STAFF ENTERPRISES LLC (USDOT 3649259, Galesville, MD) and ROD &STAFF CO LLC (USDOT 3880168, West Haven, CT). Source list provides no city/address for this Texas entry, making positive identification difficult. No web presence located under exact name 'Rod-N-Staff Wheelchair' in Texas. Likely a very small or defunct intrastate wheelchair/NEMT operator; possibly DBA under a different legal name. Texas SOS / Comptroller direct search recommended with phone or owner name as anchor.

name: Backroad Transportation LLC
notes: USDOT and entity address match (5580 Kelly Rd, Palms MI 48465). However, FMCSA classifies this carrier as Property/General Freight — NOT a passenger or school-bus carrier. Company website (backroadtransportation.com) confirms services are roll-off, construction debris removal, light demolition, scrap/sand/gravel/salt hauling — not student transport. Likely mis-classified in source list as a school/student transport company. Not a viable tuck-in target for Summit School Services on its current operating model. Wayne C Roberts is Registered Agent.

name: Chamblee Bus Ctr Asscaites LLC
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate or non-operating entity). FMCSA SAFER keyword search 'CHAMBLEE BUS' returned no records. Source-list address 1349 W Peachtree St NW, Atlanta, GA 30309 is a multi-tenant downtown Midtown office building hosting consulting / professional services tenants (e.g., Fortna, R&R Global Logistics, Zay & Co International) — NOT an operating bus yard. Likely a holding/consulting entity (note the apparent misspelling 'Asscaites' = 'Associates' in source name). Direct Georgia SOS lookup at ecorp.sos.ga.gov/BusinessSearch recommended (the eCorp endpoint returned HTTP 403 via WebFetch in this session). No evidence this entity operates school buses.
